patch.value: Structured remediation map on pm health --json for all non-extension checks

Agents consuming pm health --json get warning codes (history_drift_missing_stream, integrity_item_unreadable, telemetry_queue_pending, vectorization_stale) but must hardcode the fix; only extensions return triage.remediation.

Each check details gains remediation_map (warning-code-prefix -> fix command) e.g. history_drift->pm history-repair <id>, vectorization->pm health --refresh-vectors; brief omits it; full includes it; test asserts a non-empty map.
